landing.hero.subtitle: Drag, drop, and watch your vision come alive with Forma.
landing.features.ledeLeft: Everything you need to build, launch, and grow without writing a single line of code.
landing.features.ledeRight: Forma combines powerful tools with an intuitive interface so you can design, customize, and launch professional websites in minutes — no technical skills required.
landing.features.cards.dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop Builder
landing.features.cards.dragDrop.body: Build stunning websites with our intuitive visual editor. No code required.
landing.features.cards.responsive.title: Responsive by Default
landing.features.cards.responsive.body: Every design looks perfect on mobile, tablet, and desktop automatically.
landing.features.cards.domains.title: Custom Domains & Hosting
landing.features.cards.domains.body: Connect your domain and publish instantly. Secure, fast hosting included.
landing.features.cards.publishing.body: Go live in seconds. Update your site anytime with one click.
landing.templates.introLeft: Launch faster with professionally designed templates ready to customize.
landing.templates.introRight: Our free website builder offers 2000+ website templates, all fully customizable and ready for business.
landing.domain.title: Make your website official with your own domain name
landing.domain.note.middle: free for one year with the initial purchase of an annual
landing.faqDashboard.title: Run your business from one dashboard
landing.faqDashboard.items.ecommerce.bod: Sell products, manage orders, and track your inventory all in one place.
landing.faqDashboard.items.templates.bod: Pick from ready-made designs and launch your site faster with no design skills needed.
landing.faqDashboard.items.payments.body: , send invoices and track it all with ease.
landing.faqDashboard.items.crm.title: CRM solutions
landing.faqDashboard.items.crm.body: Manage your customer relationships and grow your pipeline.
landing.faqDashboard.items.analytics.bod: Get insights into your business performance in real time.
landing.madeOnForma.label: Made on Forma
landing.madeOnForma.body: Over 100 sites are launched with our website builder every day. Dive into our top picks to find your inspiration.
landing.builderHelpDeck.title: Website builder FAQ
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.easy.quest: Is it easy to build a website
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.easy.answe: No. Forma is built for everyone — from beginners to professionals — with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.
Yes. You can fully customize layouts, fonts, colors, images, sections, and content to match your brand and style.
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.responsive: Are the websites built with Forma responsive?
Yes. Every website is designed to adapt smoothly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.publish.qu: Can I publish my website instantly?
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.publish.an: Yes. Once your content is ready, you can publish your website in just a few clicks.
landing.builderHelpDeck.items.ai.answer: Not yet — Forma is currently focused on delivering a powerful and intuitive website-building experience. AI features are planned for the future to help streamline content creation and design workflows.
